page_types: Exam category hub (NEET, UPSC, JEE, CAT)
major_components: Navbar (82px, sticky, 1440px outer, 1296px inner, white bg)
Hero section (dark navy gradient, 55/45 split, clamp hero type, trust badge)
Trust signals (scrolling marquee + 4-stat row with action-color numbers)
Category browser (pill tag grid, surface bg, hover bg shift)
Feature cards (gradient warm, radius 20px, hover lift)
Stats block (large number + small descriptor, action color)
Content notes page (ToC sidebar, dark mode toggle, breadcrumbs)
App download bridge (QR + store badges + phone mockups)
transferable_rules: Warm action color + cool authority color — role assignment is universal, hues adapt
Hero heading: clamp(min, Nvw, max) — fluid, never fixed px
Cards: flat at rest, lifted on hover (translateY(-3px) + shadow increase)
Section padding: only 2 values per page (compact ~80px, large ~128px)
Trust before CTA — every CTA cluster has adjacent proof signal
Trust sequence: volume → authority → quality → risk-reduction
3 CTA placements minimum on any long page
Section backgrounds alternate: white → surface → dark → surface
Stats display: large bold number + small muted label (never inline)
Value before gate: 30%+ content visible before login prompt
Content pages: ToC sidebar + dark mode toggle required
All ambient animations: prefers-reduced-motion override required
Mobile sidebar: accessible alternative (NOT just display:none)
Google OAuth as primary signup mechanism
non_copy_boundaries: Indian exam names (NEET/UPSC/JEE/CAT) unless user requested EdTech
Exact marketing copy (Stop Wasted Effort Start Scoring More)
Exact feature names (Exam-Focused Smart Notes, Test Insights)
skill_modes: NEW_BRAND_MODE — original UI for different brand/industry
PAGE_GEN_MODE — specific page for specific product
SYSTEM_EXPAND_MODE — consistent addition to existing system
AUDIT_MODE — critique and upgrade weak UI
best_use_cases: Consumer mobile app landing pages with app download bridge
Audit and upgrade of generic Bootstrap/template sites

industry_adaptations.b2b_saas: Indigo/slate palette, smaller radius, trial CTA (not free), denser data
industry_adaptations.healthcare: Teal/calm palette, WCAG AAA, medical authority trust, no aggressive motion
industry_adaptations.finance: Emerald/charcoal, security badges, SOC2 trust, precision radius
industry_adaptations.developer_tools: Purple/zinc, minimal radius, dark mode primary, npm install CTA
industry_adaptations.consumer_wellness: Coral/warm palette, max radius, empathetic copy, minimal statistics
industry_adaptations.enterprise: Slate/navy, SOC2 + ISO badges, demo CTA (not buy), comparison table

confidence_by_area.shadows: high — confirmed via CSS dump and Playwright
confidence_by_area.hover_transform: medium-high — inferred from CSS, visual not screenshot-verified
confidence_by_area.mobile_layout: medium — CSS media queries confirmed, rendering inferred
confidence_by_area.post_auth_experience: low — not inspected without account creation
confidence_by_area.accessibility_compliance: medium — structure inferred, no axe/lighthouse audit
